# DataDetector.Match.SemanticDetails.Link

**Structure**

The value the framework returns for a match of a link that contains a valid URL corresponding to the original link.

## Declaration

```swift
struct Link
```

## Getting the value of the original link

- **url**: A valid URL that corresponds to the original link.

## Conforms To

- Sendable
- SendableMetatype

items.description: A valid URL that corresponds to the original link.
items.name: url
